changelog:
v1.9.3 🔧 Bug Fix Release:
📝 Markdown rendering fixed — notes with dollar signs no longer break formatting
⏰ Timestamps fixed — shows actual time instead of always 'Just now'
🔔 Sync toast — only shows on manual sync, not spammy auto-syncs
💾 Draft auto-save — going back now saves note locally as draft
⌨️ Editor keyboard — cursor area scrolls into view when keyboard opens
🔐 Biometric unlock — fingerprint/face unlock now works properly
